data.title: Ferrovial Expands Stake in Toronto’s 407 ETR Highway
data.description:
An update from Ferrovial ( (ES:FER) ) is now available.

Ferrovial has agreed to acquire up to a 5.06% stake in the 407 ETR highway from AtkinsRéalis, increasing its total ownership to 48.29%. This transaction, valued at approximately 2.090 billion Canadian dollars, is structured in two parts and is expected to close in the second quarter of 2025. The 407 ETR is a significant toll road in the Toronto metropolitan area, crucial for reducing traffic congestion. This acquisition underscores Ferrovial’s long-term commitment to enhancing infrastructure and mobility in the region, strengthening its position in the North American market.

More about Ferrovial

Ferrovial is a leading global infrastructure operator, present in over 15 countries with a workforce exceeding 25,000 employees. The company is listed on Euronext Amsterdam, Nasdaq, and the Spanish stock market, and is part of the IBEX 35. Ferrovial is recognized for its commitment to sustainability, being included in indices such as the Dow Jones Best in Class Index and adhering to the principles of the United Nations Global Compact.

YTD Price Performance: -3.05%

Average Trading Volume: 424,441

Technical Sentiment Consensus Rating: Sell

Current Market Cap: €27.85B

data.title: Xunlei Reports Mixed Financial Results for 2024 Amid Cloud Computing Challenges
data.description:
Xunlei ( (XNET) ) has provided an update.

Xunlei Limited announced its unaudited financial results for the fourth quarter and full year of 2024, revealing a mixed performance across its business segments. Despite a 9.3% year-over-year increase in total revenues for the fourth quarter, driven by subscription and live-streaming services, the company faced a significant 25.6% decline in cloud computing revenues due to unfavorable industry conditions. The full-year results showed a total revenue decrease of 11.1% from 2023, with a notable impairment charge to goodwill of $20.7 million reflecting challenges in the cloud computing sector. Xunlei’s strategic initiatives, including the acquisition of Hupu, aim to enhance its content ecosystem and drive future growth.

More about Xunlei

Xunlei Limited is a leading technology company based in Shenzhen, China, specializing in distributed cloud services. The company focuses on providing subscription services, cloud computing, and live-streaming and other internet value-added services.

YTD Price Performance: 133.81%

Average Trading Volume: 1,284,978

Technical Sentiment Consensus Rating: Sell

Current Market Cap: $324.9M

data.title: MoneyMax Financial Services Successfully Closes Digital Security Token Offerings
data.description:
MoneyMax Financial Services Ltd. ( (SG:5WJ) ) has shared an announcement.

MoneyMax Financial Services Ltd. has successfully closed its offering of Series 011, Series 012, and Series 013 digital security tokens, raising a total of S$67.7 million. These tokens will be listed on the ADDX Exchange, enhancing the company’s presence in the digital securities market. The significant participation of company insiders in the subscription of these tokens underscores strong internal confidence and commitment to the company’s strategic direction.

More about MoneyMax Financial Services Ltd.

MoneyMax Financial Services Ltd. operates in the financial services industry, focusing on digital security tokens and unsecured commercial paper programs. The company is involved in issuing and listing digital security tokens on trading platforms, targeting investors interested in digital financial instruments.

data.title: Global InterConnection Group Engages in Potential Offer Discussions
data.description:
The latest update is out from Global InterConnection Group Limited ( (NL:CABLE) ).

Global InterConnection Group Limited is in ongoing discussions with Global InterConnection Group SA regarding a potential offer, following an announcement made in December 2024. The company is also exploring other investment opportunities and aims to conclude these proceedings swiftly, keeping shareholders informed of any developments.

More about Global InterConnection Group Limited

Global InterConnection Group Limited operates in the energy and telecommunications sectors, focusing on providing interconnection services. The company is listed on Euronext Amsterdam and The International Stock Exchange, and it deals with ordinary shares and index-linked convertible green bonds.

data.title: NextNav Announces $190M Note Purchase Agreement
data.description:
An announcement from NextNav ( (NN) ) is now available.

On March 12, 2025, NextNav Inc. announced a Note Purchase Agreement for a private placement of $190 million in 5% senior secured convertible notes due 2028, led by M-Cor Capital and Fortress Investment Group. The proceeds will be used to redeem existing 10% Senior Secured Notes due 2026, enhancing NextNav’s financial position and supporting its growth objectives in the PNT industry. This transaction is expected to close around March 31, 2025, and includes issuing warrants to purchase shares of common stock to the lead investors, reflecting a strategic move to strengthen the company’s market positioning and stakeholder value.

More about NextNav

NextNav Inc. is a leader in next-generation positioning, navigation, and timing (PNT) technology, providing 3D geolocation solutions. The company focuses on delivering accurate and resilient PNT solutions for critical infrastructure and commercial applications, leveraging low-band licensed spectrum.

data.title: Intercos S.p.A. Announces Shareholders’ Meeting and Strategic Initiatives
data.description:
An update from Intercos S.p.A. ( (IT:ICOS) ) is now available.

Intercos S.p.A. has announced an ordinary and extraordinary shareholders’ meeting scheduled for April 16, 2025, to be held exclusively via telecommunication means. The agenda includes approval of the 2024 financial statements, a proposal for profit allocation and dividend distribution, and a new long-term incentive plan. Additionally, the meeting will address amendments to the Articles of Association, including provisions for holding meetings through a designated representative, and a proposed capital increase to support the incentive plan. These actions are aimed at enhancing corporate governance and aligning shareholder interests with company performance.

More about Intercos S.p.A.

Intercos S.p.A. operates in the cosmetics industry, specializing in the production and distribution of beauty products. The company focuses on providing innovative and high-quality cosmetic solutions to a global market.

data.title: Water Intelligence PLC Executes Share Buyback to Optimize Capital Structure
data.description:
Water Intelligence ( (GB:WATR) ) has provided an update.

Water Intelligence PLC announced the purchase of 7,500 of its own ordinary shares at 365 pence each, as part of a transaction authorized by shareholders. This move, executed through Dowgate Capital, aims to manage the company’s share capital and potentially enhance shareholder value. Following this transaction, the company holds 148,650 ordinary shares in treasury, impacting the total voting rights, which now stand at 19,419,038 ordinary shares.

More about Water Intelligence

Water Intelligence PLC is a leading multinational company specializing in precision, minimally-invasive leak detection and remediation solutions for both potable and non-potable water. The company focuses on providing innovative solutions to address water leakage issues, enhancing water conservation and management across various markets.

data.description:
